title: Mir TDD Ledger Schema
description: Composite TDD ledger. Per-bundle phase test plans live as top-level keys (slug-keyed objects). Per-change entries with implementation IDs live in `changes[]`. Audit history lives in `history[]`. tdd_links in phase.json reference changes[].id.

changes.description: Per-implementation change records. phase.json.tdd_links reference entries here by id.

id.description: Stable change identifier referenced by phase.json.tdd_links.

^(?!version$|changes$|history$|\\$schema.description: Per-bundle phase test plan keyed by bundle slug. Conventionally carries description, commands, expected, targets, pass_criteria.
